source_intake_record.raw_question_text:
Hint: Please answer the question requiring a floating-point number with one decimal place and provide the final value, e.g., 1.2, 1.3, 1.4, at the end.
Question: A voltage commutated chopper operating at 1 kHz is used to control the speed of dc as shown in <image>. The load current is assumed to be constant at 10 A. 
The average output voltage of the chopper will be ( ) V
